easy.title: Square Number Lambda
easy.description: Assign a lambda calculating square of `x` to `sq`.

medium.title: Sort Dicts by Key
medium.description: Sort list of product dicts by price using `sorted()` and lambda.
medium.solution:
def sort_by_price(products):
    return sorted(products, key=lambda p: p['price'])

hard.title: Late Binding Fixer
hard.description: Write function returning list of multiplier functions 1..N binding iteration variable immediately.
hard.solution:
def make_multipliers(n):
    return [lambda x, i=i: x * i for i in range(1, n + 1)]
hints: Use default arg `i=i` inside lambda definition

debugging.title: Fix Lambda Syntax
debugging.buggyCode: add = lambda a, b: return a + b
debugging.fixedCode: add = lambda a, b: a + b
bugs: `return` keyword is invalid inside lambda expressions; remove `return`.
